case_title: GEORGE BARBOUR VS. NORMAN BATES GREENLEE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT GREENLEE, NORMAN BATES IWAOKA, MARIETT DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-08-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-07-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-06-2002
